title: cacara erosa
side_effects: Cacara erosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, in individuals who consume it in excessive amounts. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also lead to skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of cacara erosa can cause liver damage and kidney failure, especially when combined with other medications or substances. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential health risks.
